deep_dive.title: DirectorBench: Diagnosing Long-Form Video Generation with Personalized Multi-Agent Evaluation
deep_dive.abstract: Long-form video generation is rapidly moving from short, single-scene synthesis toward minute-long, multi-shot creation with narrative structure, cinematic control, audio, and cross-modal synchronization. However, evaluating such videos remains challenging, since existing benchmarks largely focus on local visual quality, short-horizon temporal consistency, or generic prompt alignment, and provide limited diagnosis of workflow failures and user-dependent preferences. We introduce DirectorBench, a personalized multi-agent diagnostic benchmark for long-form video generation. DirectorBench evaluates generated videos with respect to 80 structured metadata entries, 7 user profiles, and 40 checkpoint criteria across 5 dimensions: script, visual, audio, cross-modal, and stability. Instead of reducing quality to a single aggregate score, DirectorBench localizes checkpoint-level bottlenecks and supports profile-aware evaluation. We evaluate 4 long-form video generation workflows, 6 base LLMs, and 7 user profiles. Across workflows, DirectorBench reveals a between-unit bottleneck: transition quality averages only 0.256 and reaches 0.356 for the best workflow, while prompt-level user demand fulfillment averages 0.71. We further conduct human evaluation with 14 annotators to validate the alignment between DirectorBench and human judgment. The results show that DirectorBench captures human-perceptible quality differences and reveals workflow- and profile-dependent failure modes that are hidden by aggregate scoring. These findings highlight the importance of diagnostic and profile-aware benchmarking for long-form video generation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes DirectorBench, a multi-agent diagnostic benchmark for long-form video generation evaluation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出DirectorBench，一个针对长视频生成的多智能体诊断基准
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出DirectorBench，一个针对长视频生成的多智能体诊断基准
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出DirectorBench，一个针对长视频生成的多智能体诊断基准
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DirectorBench introduces a personalized multi-agent diagnostic benchmark for evaluating long-form video generation across 5 dimensions, addressing gaps in current evaluation methods.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 长视频生成的评估面临挑战，现有基准仅关注局部质量和短期一致性。DirectorBench提出多智能体诊断框架，覆盖80个结构化元数据、7个用户画像和40个检查点，从剧本、画面、音频等5个维度评测，同时支持个性化偏好。该工作直接服务于视频生成评估，但未涉及透明视频。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 长视频生成的评估面临挑战，现有基准仅关注局部质量和短期一致性。DirectorBench提出多智能体诊断框架，覆盖80个结构化元数据、7个用户画像和40个检查点，从剧本、画面、音频等5个维度评测，同时支持个性化偏好。该工作直接服务于视频生成评估，但未涉及透明视频。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 视频生成的相关评价指标, especially work that connects or combines: transparent video generation evaluation; evaluating quality of generated videos; metrics for alpha channel in video generation; metrics for evaluating video generation models; quality of transparent videos in generation; video quality assessment metrics for generative models; What evaluation metrics are suitable for transparent video generation?; How to measure the quality of alpha channels in generated videos?; Are there any established metrics for video generation with transparency?; evaluation metrics for video generation models.
